name: 2pk Clip Window Lantern Vintage Deck Solar LED Outdoor Path Lights Matte Black - Threshold™: Automatic Hanging Solar Lanterns, Weather-Resistant
description:
Beautifully light up your home with the 2-Pack Clip Window Lantern Vintage Deck Solar LED Outdoor Path Lights from Threshold™. This pack of two matte-black path lights are designed in a rectangle lantern-like shape for vintage charm. Made with plastic, these black lantern path lights come with integrated LED bulbs that light up automatically and are solar powered. These weather-resistant solar path lights require two AA nickel metal hydride batteries to help create a glowing space whether you hang them or stake them outdoors.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
